proximity_intro.speaker: Forlorn-Ritualant
proximity_intro.text: Do not speak during the toll.

proximity_intro.speaker: Forlorn-Ritualant
proximity_intro.text: The west gate was shut before the third ringing.

proximity_intro.speaker: Forlorn-Ritualant
proximity_intro.text: Mothers pressed their children beneath the banners.

first_interaction.speaker: Forlorn-Ritualant
first_interaction.text: The Fountain should be beneath us.

first_interaction.speaker: Forlorn-Ritualant
first_interaction.text: Dry stone. Black water. Names counted without mouths.

ask_bell.speaker: Forlorn-Ritualant
ask_bell.text: There were eight for the living.

ask_bell.speaker: Forlorn-Ritualant
ask_bell.text: The Ninth had no bronze, no rope, no tower.

ask_bell.speaker: Forlorn-Ritualant
ask_bell.text: Yet all knelt when it answered.

ask_thread.speaker: Forlorn-Ritualant
ask_thread.text: For the poor child who wakes before her mother is born.

ask_thread.speaker: Forlorn-Ritualant
ask_thread.text: When the thread snaps, Orra knows you are loose.

ask_orra.speaker: Forlorn-Ritualant
ask_orra.text: She blesses only what cannot be saved.

ask_orra.speaker: Forlorn-Ritualant
ask_orra.text: Do not pray for her arrival.

peaceful_exit.speaker: Forlorn-Ritualant
peaceful_exit.text: Some gates are closed by footsteps.
